method: Local statistical weighting: item stats × role priority + utility tags + cost band + patch momentum; per-god rescoring by kit STR/INT scaling. Shop actives default max 2 (hard game max 3; melee physical may use 3). Curios share the active budget and drop at 3. Relics are separate. Damage roles (Carry/Mid/Jungle) enforce ≥10 pen and prefer passive shred (Obsidian Shard / Titan's Bane / Spears) over pure power. Items listed in buy order (early power → pen → power → defense → luxury). No external build sites.

template.description: Conquest duo ADC: sustained basic-attack DPS, crit windows, penetration, and self-heal to stay in lane/fights.
